description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image, with a pip cache at .cache/pip and a cached virtualenv directory venv/, and set the PIP_CACHE_DIR variable to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache/pip. Define a run job in the build stage that executes python setup.py bdist_wheel then pip install dist/*, and publishes the generated wheel files matching dist/*.whl as artifacts. Define a test job in the test stage that runs python setup.py test, installs tox and flake8, and runs tox -e py36,flake8. Define a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch, installs sphinx and sphinx-rtd-theme, builds the docs with cd doc ; make html, moves the output to public/, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. All jobs share a before_script that prints the Python version, installs virtualenv, creates a virtualenv in venv, and activates it, while caching .cache/pip and venv/ across jobs.
